message:
feat(cli): Add flywheel operator CLI with doctor, status, open commands

Implements polished operator CLI (flywheel_gateway-3cy):
- doctor: 10 readiness checks (Bun, deps, DB, config, TS, apps, env, git, gum)
- status: Service health checks for gateway, web, WS, database
- open: Open dashboard, API, docs, redoc, or repo URLs in browser
- Full --json support for automation
- Colorized output with proper exit codes

Includes 13 unit tests covering all commands and flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

     "db:generate": "bun run --filter @flywheel/gateway db:generate",
     "db:migrate": "bun run --filter @flywheel/gateway db:migrate",
-    "db:studio": "bun run --filter @flywheel/gateway db:studio"
+    "db:studio": "bun run --filter @flywheel/gateway db:studio",
+    "flywheel": "bun scripts/flywheel.ts"
